sections.paragraph:
Original: משׁנה

Transliteration: mishneh

Phonetic: mish-neh'

BDB Definition:

  1. double, copy, second, repetition
    1. double
    2. copy (of law)
    3. second (in order)
      1. second rank
      2. second in age
    4. second quarter or district

Origin: from H8138

TWOT entry: 2421c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
